title: Catania, Sicily — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Catania, Sicily: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Catania is a city in Sicily with a population of 311,000. A dynamic Sicilian city at the foot of Mount Etna, with Baroque architecture, a vibrant fish market, and dramatic volcanic landscapes.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
